arts.ttl: Burnley submit offer for PSG’s Ayman Kari
arts.sum: According to a report from Foot Mercato, Burnley FC have made an offer to Paris Saint-Germain for the midfielder Ayman Kari (20). The young talent has entered the final year…

arts.ttl: Monaco enquire into former Liverpool and PSG midfielder Georginio Wijnaldum
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe, AS Monaco have enquired into the status of former Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool player Georginio Wijnaldum (34). The Dutch midfielder who returned to the…

arts.ttl: Man Utd Used as Leverage in Wage Negotiations by €70M-Rated PSG Standout’s Camp
arts.sum: The January transfer window marks Ruben Amorim’s first opportunity to shape Manchester United in his image. While more significant changes are expected in the summer, reports suggest Amorim has already set his sights on a key target from Paris Saint-Germain. Manuel Ugarte, one of PSG’s summer signings, has flourished under Amorim in the past, demonstrating […] The post Man Utd Used as Leverage in Wage Negotiations by €70M-Rated PSG Standout’s Camp appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Set to Initiate Talks with Man Utd Over £70M-Rated Tottenham, PSG-Linked Talent
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to exclude Alejandro Garnacho from the Manchester derby last month has sparked renewed speculation about the winger’s future at Manchester United.
